childhood.familyBackground: Born June 1948. Younger brother Liu Yonghao is also a billionaire who founded New Hope Group. Family split into separate business ventures in 1995.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1948년 6월 출생. 형 류용호는 New Hope Group 창립자인 억만장자. 가족은 1995년 사업을 분리함.
childhood.education: Technical and business education in China
childhood.earlyLife: Started career in late 1970s by repairing radios. Inspired brother to start business together. Founded Hope Group with siblings.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1970년대 후반 라디오 수리로 경력 시작. 형에게 사업 시작을 영감줌. 형제자매와 Hope Group 창립.

careerTimeline.event: Started business by repairing radios street side
Co-founded Hope Group with siblings focusing on agriculture and feed
careerTimeline.eventKo: 형제자매와 Hope Group 공동창립, 농업 및 사료에 집중

careerTimeline.event: Hope Group split into four separate companies; Liu Yongxing retained agricultural and chemical assets
careerTimeline.eventKo: Hope Group이 4개 독립 회사로 분할; 류용싱은 농업 및 화학 자산 유지

careerTimeline.event: Founded East Hope Group focusing on aluminum and heavy chemicals
careerTimeline.eventKo: 알루미늄 및 중화학에 집중하는 East Hope Group 설립

careerTimeline.event: East Hope Group operates as major conglomerate with 30,000 employees and $24.8B revenue
careerTimeline.eventKo: East Hope Group이 30,000명 직원과 248억 달러 매출 규모 대규모 재벌로 운영

personalTraits.knownFor: Building East Hope Group into aluminum and chemical industry giant, diversifying from agriculture to heavy industry
personalTraits.knownForKo: East Hope Group을 알루미늄 및 화학 산업 거대 기업으로 구축, 농업에서 중화학으로 다변화
